prospect.name: Sarah Chen
prospect.title: VP of Sales
prospect.research_notes: Acme Corp raised $32M Series B on March 3, 2026. Sarah joined as VP Sales 6 weeks ago from Segment. Currently hiring 4 AEs and a RevOps lead. Company is in full GTM build-out mode post-funding.

Sarah Chen joined as VP Sales 6 weeks ago from Segment
Acme is hiring 4 AEs + RevOps lead on LinkedIn right now

sender.name: Jamie Torres
sender.value_prop: Help B2B sales teams ramp new AEs 40% faster and hit quota in their first 90 days
sender.social_proof_stat: Helped Rippling get their last AE cohort to first close in 61 days

email.body:
Saw Acme's $32M raise last month — congrats. Hiring 4 AEs while you're also building out RevOps is a lot to sequence at once.

We help B2B sales teams ramp new reps 40% faster. Rippling got their last AE cohort to first close in 61 days using Velocity.

Are you free Thursday for 15 minutes?
email.personalization_hook: Acme Corp $32M Series B funding announcement, March 3, 2026 — combined with active AE hiring visible on LinkedIn.
email.cta: Are you free Thursday for 15 minutes?

variants.subject_line: AE ramp after a Series B
variants.body:
Four AE hires right after a $32M raise — you're moving fast, Sarah.

We help sales teams get new reps to first close 40% sooner. Rippling's last AE cohort hit quota in 61 days with Velocity.

Worth a quick 15-minute chat this week?

Noticed Acme is hiring 4 AEs right now — post-Series B build-out is fast and exciting, but new rep ramp time usually takes a hit.

Velocity helps B2B teams cut AE ramp by 40%. Rippling got their last cohort to first close in 61 days.

Open to a 15-minute call to see if it's relevant?
